2603.17822.title: Multi-Source Evidence Fusion for Audio Question Answering
2603.17822.paper_summary: Large audio language models (LALMs) can answer questions about speech, music, and environmental sounds, yet their internal reasoning is largely opaque and difficult to validate. We describe TalTech's solution to the Agent Track of the Interspeech 2026 Audio Reasoning Challenge, in which systems are evaluated on reasoning process quality, specifically the factual accuracy, logical soundness, and completeness of their reasoning chains. Our multi-source ensemble pipeline uses two LALMs that generate independent observations, while a separate text-only reasoning model cross-checks these against outputs from 25 acoustic tools organized into reliability tiers. By grounding every inference step in explicit, reliability-tagged evidence, the system produces dense, verifiable reasoning chains. Our system ranked first in the challenge, outperforming all competing systems by a wide margin in challenge's reasoning quality metric.
2603.17822.paper_summary_zh: 大型音頻語言模型（LALMs）可以回答有關語音、音樂和環境聲音的問題，但它們的內部推理在很大程度上是不透明的，且難以驗證。我們描述了TalTech在2026年國際語音會議音頻推理挑戰賽的代理追蹤中的解決方案，在該挑戰中，系統的評估基於推理過程的質量，特別是事實準確性、邏輯合理性和推理鏈的完整性。我們的多源集成管道使用兩個LALMs生成獨立的觀察結果，而一個獨立的僅文本推理模型則將這些結果與25個根據可靠性層級組織的聲學工具的輸出進行交叉檢查。通過將每一步推理基於明確的、標記可靠性的證據，系統生成了密集的、可驗證的推理鏈。我們的系統在挑戰中排名第一，在挑戰的推理質量指標上大幅超越所有競爭系統。
2603.17822.author: Aivo Olev et.al.
